harbour.tagline: The host starts a session in Master Bridge and shares a room code. Players join with the code - no catalogue, no sign-up.
harbour.playerHint: Enter the room code from your host and your name
harbour.hostHint: Create games, open rooms, and run sessions in Master Bridge

bridge.title: Master Bridge
bridge.subtitle: Your dashboard: games, templates, and sessions
bridge.myGamesHint: Public games cannot be edited in place — duplicate and change the private copy.
bridge.noGamesYet: No games yet. Create one or copy a template below.
bridge.activeSessionsHint: These sessions are still running. Open the host console to continue.
bridge.registerSubtitle: No email required - username and password only
bridge.usernameRememberWarning: Remember your username - without it you cannot recover access. You can reset your password if you know your username.
bridge.loginRememberHint: You must remember your username. Forgot your password? You can reset it.
bridge.resetPasswordHint: Enter your username and a new password. The username must be exact - we cannot remind you without email.
bridge.resetUsernameNotFound: No host found with this username. Check the spelling.
bridge.resetSuccess: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
bridge.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
bridge.visibilityPrivateHint: Only visible in your My games section.
bridge.visibilityPublicHint: Other hosts can see it and run sessions with it.
bridge.communityGamesHint: Public games from other hosts. Start a session or duplicate a private copy to customise.
bridge.noScenesHint: Add at least one scene before starting a session.
bridge.noScenesPublishHint: Add at least one scene before making the game public.
bridge.languageSectionsHint: Enable only the languages you write in. One or both is fine.
bridge.englishIncomplete: Fill in the English title and description.
bridge.russianIncomplete: Fill in the Russian title and description.

gameErrors.LANGUAGE_REQUIRED: At least one language is required.
gameErrors.SCENE_KEY_TAKEN: This scene key already exists in the game.
gameErrors.SCENE_LANGUAGE_REQUIRED: Scene text in at least one language is required.
gameErrors.INVALID_SCENE_KEY: Scene key: latin letters, numbers, _ and -

bridge.noCommunityGames: No public games from other hosts yet.
bridge.scenesHint: Add at least one scene before starting a session or publishing.
bridge.masterNotesHint: Game-wide context for your eyes only. NPCs and their secrets, group resources, possible endings. Players never see this.
bridge.masterNotesPlaceholder: NPCs and secrets, group resources, possible endings...
bridge.savedScenesHint: Already in the game. You can edit or delete them.
bridge.gameSetupHint: Configure hero slots and traits first, save, then generate scenes.
bridge.heroSlotsHint: Each slot = one player. Every slot has one fixed strength and one fixed weakness (unique across the game). Other traits are rolled randomly for each player.
bridge.strengthRequired: Every hero slot needs a fixed strength.
bridge.weaknessRequired: Every hero slot needs a fixed weakness.
bridge.duplicateStrength: Strengths must be unique across the game.
bridge.duplicateWeakness: Weaknesses must be unique across the game.
bridge.strengthWeaknessSame: A hero's strength and weakness cannot be the same.
bridge.traitsHint: At least {min}. Each trait rolls 0 to {max} points (per-trait cap).
bridge.traitsRandomHint: Player taps Generate: each shared trait gets a random value up to the max.
bridge.noHeroSlotsYet: Add hero slots using the buttons above.
bridge.aiScenesHint: Heroes are optional: you can generate a prompt without slots. 1) Set description and (optional) heroes. 2) Prompt. 3) AI reply. 4) Draft. 5) Save.
bridge.aiPlayerCountHint: 2–8. If no heroes yet, pacing target; slots can be added later.
bridge.noteSceneDraftHint: NOTE: empty player text is expected. Content lives in hostOnlyNotes only.
bridge.aiStoryBriefPlaceholder: E.g. three acts, rivals are prospectors, open ending, moral choice at the climax
bridge.aiHostNotesPlaceholder: Optional. E.g. grounded realism, open ending, moral choice at the climax
bridge.pasteAiResponsePlaceholder: Paste JSON with a scenes array
bridge.draftReady: Draft ready: {count} scenes. Review and save.

sceneImportErrors.INVALID_JSON: Could not parse JSON. Check the format.
sceneImportErrors.INVALID_FORMAT: JSON does not match the scene format.
sceneImportErrors.NOTE_EMPTY_NOTES: NOTE scene has empty hostOnlyNotes. Host notes must not be empty.
sceneImportErrors.NOTE_NOT_LAST: NOTE scene must be the last item in the scenes array.

bridge.noScenesYet: No scenes yet. Add the first one below.
bridge.sceneKeyHint: Latin letters, numbers, _ and -. e.g. briefing, ruins
bridge.playerTaskHint: Short tasks for players. The host reveals each one separately during the scene.
bridge.sceneBackgroundHint: Shown to players when the host starts the scene.
bridge.sceneIllustrationsHint: Objects and details (wolf, obstacle…). Host reveals each separately; background stays. Search labels for pictures are in the host notes for this scene.
bridge.imageUploadUnavailable: Upload is unavailable. Check server storage settings.
bridge.imageUploadCredentials: R2 rejected the credentials. Check S3_ENDPOINT, access key, secret, and token permissions (Object Read & Write).
bridge.sceneLanguageRequired: Enable at least one language for the scene.
bridge.englishSceneIncomplete: Fill in the English scene text.
bridge.russianSceneIncomplete: Fill in the Russian scene text.

play.title: Join session
play.nameHint: Your name is unique in this room. Remember it - you need the same code and name to return.
play.nameCheckingHint: Please wait while we verify your name
play.nameCheckIdleHint: Fill in both fields - the button will activate after the check

nameCheck.available: This name is free in the room
nameCheck.reconnect: This name is already in the room - you can rejoin with it
nameCheck.blocked: The game has started. This name is not on the player list
nameCheck.session_not_found: No room found with this code
nameCheck.invalid_name: Enter a name between 1 and 32 characters

play.needJoin: Enter your room code and name first
play.rejoinPrompt: Enter your code and name again to rejoin the room
play.lobbyWaiting: Waiting for everyone to get ready. The host will open the game when it's time.
play.pickHeroHint: Each slot can be taken only once.
play.characterCardHeroHint: Your role and fixed strength / weakness for this hero slot.
play.characterCardHint: Generate traits. You can reroll until you press Ready.
play.sharedTraitsGenerateHint: Press Generate to randomly split points across the shared trait list.
play.sharedTraitsRerollHint: You can reroll until you press Ready.
play.readyWaiting: Great, you're all set! Waiting for the host to kick things off.
play.noHeroSlotsConfigured: The host has not configured heroes yet. Please wait.
play.sessionEndedHint: This session has ended. Player data was cleared - you cannot rejoin.

errors.SESSION_NOT_FOUND: Room not found. Check the code.
errors.SESSION_ENDED: This game has already ended. You cannot join.
errors.NAME_NOT_IN_SESSION: The game has started. New players cannot join. Enter the name you used when you first joined.
errors.INVALID_INPUT: Check the code and your name.
errors.UNKNOWN: Could not connect. Please try again.

session.needPlayersToStart: At least one player must be in the room.
session.startConfirmBody: The game will begin for {count} players. New players cannot join after this. Start the first scene with Start scene.
session.startConfirmNotReady: Note: {count} players have not pressed Ready yet.
session.gameStartedWaiting: Welcome! The host is about to open the first scene - keep an eye on your screen.
session.scenesLobbyHint: After Start game, press Start scene on the scene you want.
session.scenesActiveHint: Start a scene, then reveal text and tasks to players separately.
session.sceneInProgress: Scene {order}. Watch your screen - the host is unfolding the story.
session.noteScenePreview: Host note - players do not see this
session.noScenesInGame: This game has no scenes. Add them in the template editor.
session.waitingHost: The host is preparing the next moment...

dice.rollDiceHostHint: Pick a die — all players will see the result
dice.waitingHostDismiss: Waiting for the host to dismiss the result

el-dorado.title: In Search of El Dorado
el-dorado.description: An Amazon jungle expedition for treasure. Grounded realism, no supernatural.
